common.sessionEndedMessage: Your session has ended. Please log in again.

settings.linkProviderSub: Scan a provider's QR code to connect your records
settings.subscriptionNoneSub: You don't have a subscription yet
settings.pushNotificationsSubPatient: Get alerts for appointments and more
settings.biometricSub: Use Face ID, Touch ID, Fingerprint, or device passcode to unlock
settings.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
settings.sessionNotFound: Session not found. Please log in again
settings.twoFactorSub: Add an extra layer of security to your account
settings.twoFactorScanHint: Scan this QR code with Google Authenticator or any TOTP app.
settings.twoFactorEnterCodeLabel: Enter the 6-digit code from your app
settings.twoFactorDisableFailed: Failed to turn off two-factor authentication
settings.twoFactorRecoveryWarning: Save these codes somewhere safe. Each can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator app.
settings.twoFactorDisableHint: Enter a current 6-digit code or a recovery code to turn off two-factor authentication.
settings.twoFactorLockedMessage: Two-factor authentication is required by your administrator and cannot be turned off.
settings.twoFactorPrimaryOnlyMessage: Two-factor authentication can only be changed while you are signed into your primary company. Switch to your primary company to turn it on or off.
settings.twoFactorPrimaryOnlySub: View only — manage from your primary company
settings.linkErrorMessage: We could not open the page. Please check your connection and try again.

languageChange.rtlMessage: The app needs to restart to apply the new text direction.
languageChange.manualRestart: Please close and reopen the app to apply the new layout.
languageChange.changedMessage: The app language has been updated.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.subtitle: Permanently delete your account
deleteAccount.modalIntro: Please review what happens when you delete your account:
deleteAccount.bullet1: Deleting your account will remove your access to the app.
deleteAccount.bullet2: Your personal profile data will be deleted or anonymized where legally allowed.
deleteAccount.bullet3: Your uploaded profile photo and documents will be deleted where legally allowed.
deleteAccount.bullet4: Appointment, invoice, audit, or medical/legal records may be retained only if legally required.
deleteAccount.bullet5: This action cannot be undone once completed.
deleteAccount.genericError: We couldn’t complete account deletion. Please try again.

notifPrompt.title: Enable Appointment Notifications?
notifPrompt.message: Maw3edak uses notifications to send appointment confirmations, appointment reminders, appointment requests, schedule changes, doctor or patient updates, visit/payment updates, security alerts, and important account updates.
notifPrompt.deniedMessage: Notifications are disabled. You can enable them later from your device settings.
